jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Haldiram's
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
